verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are holy (You are holy) You are mighty (You are mighty) You are worthy (You are worthy) Worthy of praise (Worthy of praise)

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will follow (I will follow) I will listen (I will listen) I will love You (I will love you) All of my days (All of my days)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I will sing to (You are the Lord of Lords) And worship (You are the King of Kings) The King who (You are mighty God) Is worthy (Lord of everything) I will love Him (You're Emmanuel) Adore Him (You're the great I Am) I will bow down (You're the Price of Peace) Before Him (Who is the Lamb)

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I will sing to (You're the living God) And worship (You're my saving grace) The King who (You will reign forever) Is worthy (You are ancient of days) I will love Him (You are Alpha, Omega) Adore Him (Beginning and End) I will bow down (You're my Savior, Messiah) Before Him (Redeemer and Friend)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You're my Prince of Peace And I will live my life for You
